name: Weight Gain Crawler- Dungeons & Decadence
description:
A fully fledged WG Dungeon Crawler RPG complete with feeder mobs, special rooms, items, etc!

Your typical EXP bar is replaced by "Fullness", and levels with "Weight."

Suggestion by: @Literallytheguy. Thank you!

This is quite different from my usual characters! I do have a bot that claims to be a Weight Gain RPG but that's a bit of a misnomer... this one should live up to the name with tracked stats, player options (suggested), and random events!

There's two designed paths here... Resistance, where you fight against what the dungeon has to offer, and Indulgence, where you simply give in... the dungeon doesn't want to hurt you. It wants to feed you...

Each path has its own mobs and items to go along with it. Both should be viable, but one is definitely easier than the other....

Weight Tiers are in order; Light, Soft, Chubby, Heavy, Critical, and Immobile. I know your characters may already be chunky so think of these as relative to your starting body type!

Runs hard stop at the Immobile Weight. I mean you literally can't move lol... You may continue anyway for narrative purposes of course...

Q: Is Weight good or bad?

A: Honestly, it's not that straight forward! I'd say it depends on which playstyle you're choosing. But both should choose to avoid the Immobile tier! Anything below that is free game—

That's all I have to say for now! If you have questions feel free to ask and I'll answer them to my best ability. Some of the fun is definitely in experimenting though... Have fun!

(Sorry for the basic name... the feeder dungeons was supposed to be a placeholder but I never got around to changing it lol

also 700+ messages are just from my testing chats... Safe to say I found it fun lol)
creator: Henrygrey875
